positive: A minimalist, highly stylized graphic design of a cosmic landscape featuring abstract celestial bodies, swirling nebulae rendered in deep indigo, cyan, and violet, contrasting with sharp, luminous constellations of gold and white. The central element is a stylized, symmetrical silhouette of a roaring, abstract cosmic creature or celestial beast, formed by the intersecting lines of stars. The overall composition should utilize strong, clean black linework against the vibrant space background, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Use a retro-futuristic, vaporwave-inspired aesthetic with strong, contrasting contrasts and perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, artifacts, low detail, poorly rendered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, gradient, gradient fade, photorealism, 3d render, busy, clutter
